# coolify_deployment (Data Source)

Retrieves information about a single Coolify deployment by UUID.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up a single deployment by UUID
data "coolify_deployment" "example" {
  uuid = "your-deployment-uuid"
}

output "deployment_status" {
  value = data.coolify_deployment.example.status
}

output "deployment_server" {
  value = data.coolify_deployment.example.server_uuid
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the deployment.

### Read-Only

- `server_uuid` (String) The UUID of the server the deployment ran on.
- `status` (String) The current status of the deployment.
